steps.instruction: Look at the tens digit of each number. 54 has 5 tens. 37 has 3 tens.
steps.explanation: Always compare tens first. The number with more tens is greater.

steps.instruction: Since 5 tens is more than 3 tens, we already know the answer.
steps.explanation: We don't even need to look at the ones because 5 tens is already more than 3 tens. 54 is greater than 37.

steps.instruction: Both numbers have the same tens digit. 62 has 6 tens. 68 has 6 tens.
steps.work: 6 tens = 6 tens. The tens are the same!
steps.explanation: When the tens are equal, we cannot decide yet. We need to look at the ones.

steps.instruction: Now look at the ones. 62 has 2 ones. 68 has 8 ones.
The number with more ones is greater (since tens were equal).
steps.explanation: 62 is less than 68. When tens are the same, the ones decide which number is bigger.
